chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5029 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.21032/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 & 2 3. For order on Misc. No.21033/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.21034/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 21.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Riaz advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The petitioner has received a call up notice from respondent No.3 in Inquiry No.1830/2025 NCCIA, Karachi. In his prayer petitioner states that such call up notice is illegal. We do not find any illegality in the call up notice. The petitioner shall join the inquiry and offer his full cooperation. The Investigating Officer shall carry out the inquiry impartially, fairly and strictly in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this order shall be sent to respondent No.3, for compliance. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
